query:
SELECT e.name, e.neighborhood
FROM establishments e 
WHERE e.categoryId = 2 
  AND (e.name LIKE '%bar%' OR e.name LIKE '%Bar%' OR e.name LIKE '%boteco%' OR e.name LIKE '%Boteco%')
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT e.name, e.neighborhood
FROM establishments e 
WHERE e.categoryId = 2 
  AND (e.name LIKE '%bar%' OR e.name LIKE '%Bar%' OR e.name LIKE '%boteco%' OR e.name LIKE '%Boteco%')
LIMIT 20;
